text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
The Turbo Call! See, when I win, I wanna have
everyone call my name, just like King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Repeating one's name and praising oneself
prompts the fans to follow along.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A first-rate runner's first-rate call will captivate
fans and show them what to do. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
The fans? Psh. You don't need to do a
demonstration.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Just say, "Shut up and follow me." They'll be as
good as lemmings.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Let Turbo try! ...Shaddup and follow Turbo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not half bad... Silence, and follow my lead!
